title: wislizenia refracta subsp. palmeri
intro: Wislizenia refracta subsp. palmeri, also known as Palmer's wislizenia or Palmer's cryptomeria, is a plant species that belongs to the candelabra plant family. It is native to the southwestern United States and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of Wislizenia refracta subsp. palmeri include tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
